March 21, 2026 v1.1.0 releases

Version 1.1.0 Released

Dark mode UI update with improved relationships view. This release includes updated UI styling, dark theme support, cleaner code organization, and enhanced visual relationships between design tokens.
Read full article

Building Themes with Winden Tokens: Light Mode, Dark Mode & Beyond

Overview
Read full article
March 19, 2026 v1.0.0 releases

Version 1.0.0 Released

Major milestone with managed shade generator, step generator for numbers, multi-mode support, and preset imports. Includes collection filters, type filters, and ability to reuse existing variables for powerful design token workflows.
Read full article

March 10, 2024 tutorials

5 Best Practices for Organizing Design Tokens at Scale

Design tokens are the foundation of any scalable design system. After working with hundreds of users, we’ve identified the patterns that separate good token systems from great ones.
Read full article
March 05, 2024 v1.1.5 releases

10x Faster: Major Performance Improvements for Bulk Editing

Major performance update makes bulk editing up to 10x faster for large design systems. Updating 500 tokens now takes ~2 seconds instead of ~10 seconds with optimized variable updates, smarter re-rendering, and faster JSON imports.
Read full article
